title: Salty Light Cozy Mexican Turmeric Stir-fry
description: A light and cozy mexican dish featuring turmeric that is both flavorful and jain-friendly. This dish is perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Prepare the turmeric and ginger by grating them into fine pieces.
In a wok or skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced scallions and jalapeno peppers, sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add tomato puree, coconut milk, lime juice, salt, and turmeric to the wok. Stir well to combine.
Lower the heat to low-medium and simmer for another 5-7 minutes or until sauce thickens slightly.
If using avocado, slice it thinly and add to the stir-fry just before serving to prevent browning.
Garnish with scallions if desired. Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
